div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Vice Consul at Lourengo Marques, Mozambique (Stanton)
div.p: Referring to Department’s instruction of November 8, 1929, concerning recent legislation affecting religious missions in Mozambique, please take up again with the Governor General in the sense of Department’s instruction above referred to, page two, and report to Department.

A communication has been received from the Foreign Missions Conference of North America enclosing a memorandum for presentation to the Portuguese Government at Lisbon, a copy of which is being sent to you under cover of transmitting despatch.Not printed.
